mapper.select: SELECT c.CODE_NAME AS codeName, c.CODE AS code, c.DESCRIPTION AS description, c.USE_YN AS useYn, c.SORT_ORDER AS sortOrder, c.CREATED_AT AS createdAt, c.CREATED_ID AS createdId, c.UPDATED_AT AS updatedAt, c.UPDATED_ID AS updatedId FROM code_groups g JOIN codes c ON g.GROUP_CODE = c.GROUP_CODE WHERE g.GROUP_CODE = #{code} AND c.USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY c.SORT_ORDER

SELECT c.CODE AS code, c.GROUP_CODE AS groupGode, c.CODE_NAME AS codeName, c.DESCRIPTION AS description, c.USE_YN AS useYn, c.SORT_ORDER AS sortOrder, c.CREATED_AT AS createdAt, c.CREATED_ID AS createdId, c.UPDATED_AT AS updatedAt, c.UPDATED_ID AS updatedId FROM codes c ORDER BY c.SORT_ORDER
